properties.Test Case: DR: The fonts/sizes in Normal that come from each DR template should be there.
properties.Steps: DR: The fonts/sizes in Normal that come from each DR template should be there.

properties.Test Case: DR: If you click on the format gear, you should be told that it isn't allowed. (JT 6.3: not true since at least 6.1. See discussion in BL-15703.)
properties.Steps: DR: If you click on the format gear, you should be told that it isn't allowed. (JT 6.3: not true since at least 6.1. See discussion in BL-15703.)

properties.Test Case: DR check the blue markup indicating non-decodable words, and that they update as the user types to fix them, or changes the stage to a higher level that allows them.
properties.Steps: DR check the blue markup indicating non-decodable words, and that they update as the user types to fix them, or changes the stage to a higher level that allows them.

properties.Test Case: New books get whatever Decodable stage was last set with a control (not stage 1, not whatever stage was last "seen" in a book). We don't know that this is that important, but it's the behavior we expect. (JT: of course this is only true for a book made from the main DR template. A book made from a template in the bloompack gets whatever stage that book specifies.)
